title: status normalize bug: collection_status shows 'ok' when step fails
body:
## Bug Report

Plugin version: 1.18.0

The triage collector reports `collection_status: ok` even when the underlying
step partially fails. The issue originates in `scripts/collectors/_inflight.py line 42`
where section error counting does not account for skipped sections.

See also `aria/skills/issue-triage/scripts/collectors/_common.py:28` for the
`CollectorResult.soft_error` method that accumulates errors silently.

Reproduction steps:
1. Run triage with no forgejo credentials
2. Observe step5_inflight.collection_status = 'ok' instead of 'error'

Expected: collection_status = 'error' when all sections fail
Actual: collection_status = 'ok'

Related: [_inflight.py](aria/skills/issue-triage/scripts/collectors/_inflight.py#L42)
